message:
feat(core): add lock-free metrics primitives and global metrics surface

Introduce Counter, GaugeI64, GaugeU64, and Log2Histogram (fixed 64-
bucket approximating p50/p95/p99 via nearest-rank) as zero-allocation,
lock-free primitives. Define GlobalMetrics aggregating HTTP (requests/
inflight/status codes/latency), Tools (calls/errors/latency), DB pool
(acquire counts/latency/connection gauges/utilization/peak), and Storage
(WBQ enqueued/drained/errors/fallbacks) metrics behind a LazyLock
singleton so every crate can record without contention.

Includes unit tests for bucket indexing, empty histogram edge cases,
and quantile monotonicity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
